title: UFC DomainProcedureRegistry design manifest
description: Machine-readable expected compilation units under a layer domain bucket. Curated in design/; compared to ufc_core and generated/ by domain_procedure_registry_align.py.

domain_bucket.description: First path segment under the layer in ufc_core (e.g. Base, Matrix).

intent_doc.description: Optional relative path from this manifest to human INTENT (e.g. INTENT.md).

infer_list_anchor.description: Optional repo-relative path to PPLAN infer list for traceability.

source_rel.description: Path relative to ufc_core root, POSIX slashes (e.g. L2_NM/Matrix/NM_Mtx.f90).

stem.description: Optional; defaults to basename of source_rel without .f90

module.description: Optional expected MODULE name; if omitted, align tool treats stem === module as the policy check.
